name: Cornbread Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 Hamburger Buns (4 Halves), Soaked In Water
recipeInstructions:
1. Season giblets generously and cook in 2 quarts of water until tender.
2. Remove giblets from broth, reserving the broth. Grind or process giblets in a food processor until fine and return to broth; set aside.
3. Cook onions, celery, bell pepper, and garlic in 1/2 cup cooking oil until tender. Add giblets and broth to this mixture and continue to cook over medium heat, stirring often, until the mixture reaches the consistency of thick gravy (approximately 30 minutes). Set aside.
4. CORNBREAD: Combine cornmeal, baking powder, and salt. To this mixture, add 3 eggs, melted butter, and milk. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until golden brown.
5. In a large bowl, crumble the cornbread, soaked hamburger buns, 3 beaten eggs, giblet mixture, green onions, and parsley. Mix well and pour into a 9x13 pan. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 30 minutes.
